title: Carrits Crops
description: Redone crops, foliage, and more importantly SEED BAGS!!
body:
**Carrits crops** is a texture pack i made in like two days to redo some small textures i thought needed some changes, its nothing cazy but if youd like to use it then go ahead :)
![spcing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df2a78cc5b6b2ac3064e06cccb834ef60be9865d.png)

## Features
- 🌱 **New crops** - The crops now have differently textures growing stages and products
- 👜 **Seed bags** - The seeds are now retextred to bags of seeds (and bonemeal)
- 🌿 **Foliage** - The foliage is redone and simplified, making them match the blocks more.
- 💐 **Flowers** - The flowers are all also changed.
- 📺 **GUI changes** - The gui has redtextured the hunger bars to little Carrots with Appleskin compat!

![spcing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df2a78cc5b6b2ac3064e06cccb834ef60be9865d.png)

**Nothing crazy in this pack but i like it and i hope you do too, thanks so much for thinking of downloading this.**
